description: Hardening the Jitsi Meet interface for a correctional visitation kiosk. Remove the 'Chat', 'Screen Share', and 'Invite' features from the meeting interface by modifying the configuration file at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/interface_config.js. Apply the changes to the Jitsi environment and verify the features are disabled in the meeting room "VisitationUnit1".
